infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Robot Control uses Bluetooth to discover, pair with, and send movement commands to your robot.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Robot Control uses Bluetooth to discover, pair with, and send movement commands to your robot.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Robot Control uses your location to anchor the lidar map: the robot is plotted at your current position and its scan points are placed at real-world coordinates around you.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Robot Control uses Bluetooth to discover, pair with, and send movement commands to your robot.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Robot Control uses your location to anchor the lidar map: the robot is plotted at your current position and its scan points are placed at real-world coordinates around you.
